title: Filipino Science Terms
content: Use 'pototsintesis' or explain as 'paggawa ng pagkain ng halaman gamit ang sikat ng araw'. Use 'singaw ng tubig' for water vapor and 'yelo' for ice.

title: Cebuano Science Terms
content: Use 'tubig' for water, 'init' for heat, 'pabugnaw' for cooling, and 'yelo' for ice. Prefer short learner-friendly sentences.

title: Ilocano Classroom Terms
content: Use respectful classroom wording and include an English bridge when technical terms may be unfamiliar.
